notes:
* If you are using a controller (Dualsense in my case), the game crashes on the main menu when running with Vulkan. 

* This does not occur with DX11, which does sort of work. However, DX11 has a very noticeable input lag on the controller (feels like playing runescape or something with a dialup connection back in the day. Not unplayable, but not entirely pleasant). DX11 also feels a bit more taxing on the system than Vulkan.

* If attempting to startup the game with Vulkan and no controller, everything appears to be fine, including there not being a noticeable input lag. Attempting to connect a controller once past the main menu causes the entire game to act like it's possessed, pressing random inputs by itself until eventually it crashes.

Everything so far seems to be fine provided you only use mouse and keyboard, which is a bit of a bummer because I enjoy playing these games whilst relaxing on my couch.


Also GE proton causes the game to always launch in Vulkan as it skips the launcher. I haven't really looked at the config all too much to see if you can change this, but either way I didn't really notice a difference between GE and Proton experimental so I will probably just be using Proton Experimental for this game.
